files.notes: This file appears to be a continuation of Margaret Gay Judd Clawson's reminiscences from a previous issue. The text begins mid-sentence and ends with 'To be continued', indicating this is part of a serialized autobiography. The content covers her journey west with her family, including experiences on the plains, encounters with other travelers, and a cattle stampede. There are also some historical photographs of Carthage Jail and other locations mentioned in the narrative.
